description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses a before_script to run npm install, caches the node_modules/ directory per job with key $CI_JOB_NAME and untracked files. Define three test jobs named test:node10, test:node6, and test:node8, each using the node:10, node:6, and node:8 Docker images respectively, all running in the default test stage. Each job executes the shared script that runs npm run lint followed by npm test. No additional stages, artifacts, or rules are defined.
